name: SystemInfo
description: Ecosystem heartbeat. Machine awareness — CPU, RAM, disk, processes, network, Ollama status. Foundation for full VIVARIUM awareness.
author: Victory + River

tools.name: sysinfo_status
tools.description: Full system snapshot — OS, CPU, RAM, disk, uptime, Ollama status

tools.name: sysinfo_memory
tools.description: Detailed RAM breakdown — used, available, cached, swap

tools.name: sysinfo_disk
tools.description: Disk usage for all mounted partitions

tools.name: sysinfo_network
tools.description: Network interfaces, IP addresses, and IO counters
